content.headline: Augusta Country Club Pint Glass
content.description_html:
Raise a glass to Augusta Country Club, where 18 holes of Georgia golf await in the heart of Augusta. This classic layout plays to a par 72 across 6,287 yards of well-maintained fairways and greens. Whether you're a member or a visiting player, Augusta Country Club offers a solid test of golf with multiple tee options to suit your game.

Located on Washington Road, this course has been a fixture in the Augusta golf scene, providing golfers with a straightforward, enjoyable round. The routing gives you time to settle in—plan on about three and a half hours to play through. It's the kind of place where you can focus on your swing and enjoy the company of your foursome without pretense.

This laser-etched pint glass is the perfect way to commemorate your round or show your allegiance to one of Augusta's neighborhood gems. Split the Tee craftsmanship meets golf course pride in every sip.
bullets: Par 72, 6,287 yards of classic Augusta golf
18 holes with multiple tee options including Ogilvie and Harison
Located on Washington Road in Augusta, GA
